---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for Gaia (template, CLI, or harness)
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is the user — solo founder, small team, AI agent? What pain is avoided?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? If it changes the CLI surface, sketch the verb / flag / output. If it changes the template, name the files affected.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? What's the cheapest version that proves the idea?

## Scope

- [ ] Template (`apps/`, `packages/`)
- [ ] CLI (`cli/`, `bun gaia <verb>`)
- [ ] Harness (`.claude/skills/`, `.gaia/rules.ts`, hooks)
- [ ] Docs (`docs/`, README)

## Initiative

If this fits an active initiative, link the row in [`.gaia/initiatives/CLAUDE.md`](../../.gaia/initiatives/CLAUDE.md). New strategic bets go through `/d-initiative`.
